Title: Odoo on Azure Workload Documentation

Acceptance Criteria: Overview pages exist, reviewed, and linked from README.

Acceptance Criteria: Monitoring pages exist and map to actual alerts, workbooks, and observability assets.

Description: Planning, benchmark, terminology, and parity mapping docs.

Title: Integrations Family
Description: Integration playbooks across identity, AI, OCR, search, messaging, and M365.
Acceptance Criteria: Integration pages exist with clear repo ownership and boundary rules.
